WITH q1 AS (
  SELECT 
    i_category,
    'store' AS channel,
    ss_ext_sales_price - ss_ext_wholesale_cost AS profit
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
  WHERE d_quarter_name = '2001Q1'
    AND hd_dep_count = 6
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    i_category,
    'catalog' AS channel,
    cs_ext_sales_price - cs_ext_wholes...
